caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, and tan suspenders, speaks into a black microphone. He wears a distinctive, tall, pointed grey wig and black over-ear headphones. He is situated in a room where the background walls are covered in small framed photographs and shelving containing folded clothing, including items with "LEE" visible on the labels. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is superimposed on the left and right sides of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head. In the later frames, he begins to gesture with his right hand, which enters the lower right area of the frame, while remaining positioned in front of the microphone.
